mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = #{tmdbMovieId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO userpick_movie VALUES ( userpick_movie_seq.NEXTVAL, #{simpleReviewTmdbMovieId}, 1, SYSDATE, #{moviePosterPath}, #{movieTitle}, #{movieReleaseDate}, #{movieRuntime}, 0 )

INSERT INTO userpick_movie VALUES ( userpick_movie_seq.NEXTVAL, #{boardReviewTmdbMovieId}, 1, SYSDATE, #{moviePosterPath}, #{movieTitle},
TO_DATE(#{movieReleaseDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
NULL,
#{movieRuntime}, 0 )
mapper.select: select count(*) from userpick_movie
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_status = 1 AND userpick_movie_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

select * from ( select rownum as rnum, b.* from ( (select USERPICK_MOVIE_NO, USERPICK_MOVIE_TMDB_MOVIE_ID, USERPICK_MOVIE_STATUS, USERPICK_MOVIE_DATE, USERPICK_MOVIE_POSTER_PATH, USERPICK_MOVIE_TITLE, USERPICK_MOVIE_RELEASE_DATE, USERPICK_MOVIE_RUNTIME, USERPICK_MOVIE_VIEW_COUNT from userpick_movie where userpick_movie_status = 1 and userpick_movie_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' order by userpick_movie_no desc)b ) )where rnum between #{pageInfo.start} and #{pageInfo.end}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO) FROM userpick_movie um INNER JOIN userpick_genre ug ON um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO = ug.USERPICK_GENRE_MOVIE_NO WHERE um.USERPICK_MOVIE_STATUS = 1 AND ug.USERPICK_GENRE_ID = #{genreId}

select * from ( select rownum as rnum, b.* from ( (select DISTINCT um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_TMDB_MOVIE_ID, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_STATUS, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_DATE, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_POSTER_PATH, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_TITLE, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_RELEASE_DATE, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_RUNTIME, um.USERPICK_MOVIE_VIEW_COUNT from userpick_movie um INNER JOIN userpick_genre ug ON um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO = ug.USERPICK_GENRE_MOVIE_NO where um.USERPICK_MOVIE_STATUS = 1 and ug.USERPICK_GENRE_ID = #{genreId} order by um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO desc)b ) )where rnum between #{pageInfo.start} and #{pageInfo.end}
select * from userpick_movie where userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = #{tmdbMovieId}
mapper.update: update userpick_movie set userpick_movie_view_count = userpick_movie_view_count + 1 where userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = #{tmdbMovieId}
mapper.select: SELECT simple_review_rating as rating, COUNT(*) as count FROM simple_review WHERE simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = #{tmdbMovieId} GROUP BY simple_review_rating ORDER BY simple_review_rating
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userpick_movie
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_status = 2
SELECT AVG(userpick_movie_view_count) FROM userpick_movie

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tmdb_movie_id) FROM ( SELECT userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id as tmdb_movie_id FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT simple_review_tmdb_movie_id FROM simple_review UNION SELECT DISTINCT board_review_tmdb_movie_id FROM board_review ) )

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT um.userpick_movie_no) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (COUNT(DISTINCT sr.simple_review_no) + COUNT(DISTINCT br.board_review_no)) / COUNT(DISTINCT um.userpick_movie_no) END as avg_review_count FROM userpick_movie um LEFT JOIN simple_review sr ON um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = sr.simple_review_tmdb_movie_id LEFT JOIN board_review br ON um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id = br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM simple_review) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_review) FROM DUAL

SELECT ug.USERPICK_GENRE_NAME as genreName, COUNT(DISTINCT um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO) as count FROM userpick_movie um INNER JOIN userpick_genre ug ON um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO = ug.USERPICK_GENRE_MOVIE_NO GROUP BY ug.USERPICK_GENRE_NAME ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT um.userpick_movie_no as movieNo, um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id as tmdbMovieId, um.userpick_movie_title as movieTitle, um.userpick_movie_view_count as viewCount FROM userpick_movie um ORDER BY um.userpick_movie_view_count DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT um.userpick_movie_no as movieNo, um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id as tmdbMovieId, um.userpick_movie_title as movieTitle, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM simple_review sr WHERE sr.simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_review br WHERE br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id = um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id) as reviewCount FROM userpick_movie um WHERE um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT simple_review_tmdb_movie_id FROM simple_review UNION SELECT DISTINCT board_review_tmdb_movie_id FROM board_review ) ORDER BY reviewCount DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userpick_movie

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, b.* FROM ( SELECT um.userpick_movie_no as userpickMovieNo, um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id as userpickMovieTmdbMovieId, um.userpick_movie_status as userpickMovieStatus, um.userpick_movie_date as userpickMovieDate, um.userpick_movie_poster_path as userpickMoviePosterPath, um.userpick_movie_title as userpickMovieTitle, um.userpick_movie_release_date as userpickMovieReleaseDate, um.userpick_movie_runtime as userpickMovieRuntime, um.userpick_movie_view_count as userpickMovieViewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM simple_review sr WHERE sr.simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_review br WHERE br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id = um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id) as reviewCount FROM userpick_movie um ORDER BY um.userpick_movie_no DESC ) b ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{pageInfo.start} AND #{pageInfo.end}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, b.* FROM ( SELECT um.userpick_movie_no as userpickMovieNo, um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id as userpickMovieTmdbMovieId, um.userpick_movie_status as userpickMovieStatus, um.userpick_movie_date as userpickMovieDate, um.userpick_movie_poster_path as userpickMoviePosterPath, um.userpick_movie_title as userpickMovieTitle, um.userpick_movie_release_date as userpickMovieReleaseDate, um.userpick_movie_runtime as userpickMovieRuntime, um.userpick_movie_view_count as userpickMovieViewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM simple_review sr WHERE sr.simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_review br WHERE br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id = um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id) as reviewCount FROM userpick_movie um WHERE um.userpick_movie_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY um.userpick_movie_no DESC ) b ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{pageInfo.start} AND #{pageInfo.end}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO) FROM userpick_movie um INNER JOIN userpick_genre ug ON um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO = ug.USERPICK_GENRE_MOVIE_NO WHERE ug.USERPICK_GENRE_ID = #{genreId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, b.* FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT um.userpick_movie_no as userpickMovieNo, um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id as userpickMovieTmdbMovieId, um.userpick_movie_status as userpickMovieStatus, um.userpick_movie_date as userpickMovieDate, um.userpick_movie_poster_path as userpickMoviePosterPath, um.userpick_movie_title as userpickMovieTitle, um.userpick_movie_release_date as userpickMovieReleaseDate, um.userpick_movie_runtime as userpickMovieRuntime, um.userpick_movie_view_count as userpickMovieViewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM simple_review sr WHERE sr.simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_review br WHERE br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id = um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id) as reviewCount FROM userpick_movie um INNER JOIN userpick_genre ug ON um.USERPICK_MOVIE_NO = ug.USERPICK_GENRE_MOVIE_NO WHERE ug.USERPICK_GENRE_ID = #{genreId} ORDER BY um.userpick_movie_no DESC ) b ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{pageInfo.start} AND #{pageInfo.end}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userpick_movie WHERE userpick_movie_status = #{status}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, b.* FROM ( SELECT um.userpick_movie_no as userpickMovieNo, um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id as userpickMovieTmdbMovieId, um.userpick_movie_status as userpickMovieStatus, um.userpick_movie_date as userpickMovieDate, um.userpick_movie_poster_path as userpickMoviePosterPath, um.userpick_movie_title as userpickMovieTitle, um.userpick_movie_release_date as userpickMovieReleaseDate, um.userpick_movie_runtime as userpickMovieRuntime, um.userpick_movie_view_count as userpickMovieViewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM simple_review sr WHERE sr.simple_review_tmdb_movie_id = um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_review br WHERE br.board_review_tmdb_movie_id = um.userpick_movie_tmdb_movie_id) as reviewCount FROM userpick_movie um WHERE um.userpick_movie_status = #{status} ORDER BY um.userpick_movie_no DESC ) b ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{pageInfo.start} AND #{pageInfo.end}
